MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY INEZ SHEDD IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR MAY PAY THE JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PAY $100.00 OR MORE ON THE 15TH OF EVERY MONTH UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS PAID IN FULL. THE FIRST PAYMENT TO BE MADE ON OR BEFORE OCTOBER 15, 2009. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF.
